mapper.update: UPDATE class SET class_name = #{className}, teacher_id = (SELECT id FROM emp_info WHERE name = #{teacherName}), classroom = #{classroom}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = (SELECT id FROM class_status WHERE status_name = #{classStatus}), update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class(id, class_name, teacher_id, classroom, start_date, end_date, status, update_time) VALUES ( #{id}, #{className}, (SELECT id FROM emp_info WHERE name = #{teacherName}), #{classroom}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, (SELECT id FROM class_status WHERE status_name = #{classStatus}), #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, class_name, classroom, (SELECT name FROM emp_info WHERE id = teacher_id) AS teacherName, start_date, end_date, (SELECT status_name FROM class_status WHERE id = status) AS classStatus, update_time FROM class WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT
id,
class_name,
classroom,
(SELECT name FROM emp_info WHERE id = teacher_id) AS teacherName,
start_date,
end_date,
(SELECT status_name FROM class_status WHERE id = status) AS classStatus,
update_time,
1 FROM class
